purpose: Starting component maps. A value is production-eligible only when a deterministic calculation proof reproduces its low/base/high outputs; otherwise classify it as unpriced or legacy_sensitivity.

resource_or_land_owner: undeveloped reserves or acreage by development bucket
surface or real estate by use bucket
scarce_strategic_asset: cash, debt, minority claims, and realization reserve

valuation_statuses.calculated: Reproduced entirely from locked cited facts and deterministic arithmetic.
valuation_statuses.bounded_estimate: Reproduced from cited facts plus disclosed judgments constrained to approved ranges.
valuation_statuses.unpriced: A material input is unavailable; no complete component range is displayed.
valuation_statuses.legacy_sensitivity: A historical unsupported range retained for comparison but excluded from security value.

economic_value_contract: Every explicit component schedule requires an exact economic claim, exhaustive non-overlapping component groups, source-locked facts, bounded assumptions, deterministic formulas, low/base/high output nodes, falsifiers, and a generated calculation trace.
falsifier_rule: valuation.falsifier may override the deterministic category/method falsifier; one is always emitted in the valuation proof.
valuation_range_rule: Raw low/base/high fields are legacy inputs. Production ranges must be emitted by calculation_proof outputs; missing material inputs produce unpriced, never an analyst plug.

driver_models.revenue_owner_cash_dcf: Capital-free royalty, toll, or lease revenue converted to after-tax owner cash.
driver_models.reinvestment_return_dcf: Infrastructure or service growth that explicitly charges the capital needed to create incremental owner cash.
driver_models.unit_nav: Acreage, reserves, rights, or other units multiplied by a unit mark, realization probability, economic claim, and friction.
driver_models.milestone_project_option: Uncontracted project success value multiplied by milestone probability and ownership, less remaining cost.
